findings.issue: WoS Starter API key hardcoded as workflow_dispatch default input value (value: 1a0367...62ab8). Public-trackable in git history.
findings.fix: Rotate key on Clarivate developer portal, store in GitHub Secrets as WOS_API_KEY, reference via ${{ secrets.WOS_API_KEY }}, set default: ''

findings.issue: Scopus (Elsevier) API key hardcoded as workflow input default (value: 5a33a2...81790). Linked to P6-meta-analysis-CTU institution credential.
findings.fix: Rotate via Elsevier Developer Portal, store in secrets.SCOPUS_API_KEY

findings.issue: OpenAlex API key hardcoded as workflow input default (value: WV8Aj...EpYY)
findings.fix: Request new key from OpenAlex team, store in secrets.OPENALEX_API_KEY

findings.issue: Scopus API key duplicated hardcoded (same as CRIT-2). Step at line 39 already has secrets fallback but default value still exposes key.
findings.fix: Set default: '' so secrets.SCOPUS_API_KEY is used

findings.issue: GitHub Actions input ${{ github.event.inputs.X }} interpolated directly into run: bash. Classic GH Actions script injection pattern (CodeQL js/actions/command-injection).
findings.fix: Move inputs into env: block of step, reference via "$VAR" in bash

findings.issue: Same direct-input-into-run pattern across 5 workflow files
findings.fix: Apply env-var wrapping pattern to all workflows

findings.issue: Hardcoded absolute path /root/.claude/uploads/4342a099-...e99f exposes agent filesystem layout; not portable to other machines
findings.fix: Read from env var WBES_DATA_DIR or sys.argv with sensible default

findings.issue: Author personal email Thuyhuongctu@gmail.com hardcoded in OpenAlex User-Agent header (PII, not credential; required by polite-pool convention)
Institutional email huongp1323001@gstudent.ctu.edu.vn hardcoded as CLI arg --email
Author full name + email username hardcoded in BLIND_PATTERNS (intentional for blind-review leak detection but PII still committed)
findings.fix: Acceptable as designed; consider loading from external config file gitignored

findings.issue: Bare except: clause swallows all exceptions including KeyboardInterrupt/SystemExit
findings.fix: Use except Exception as e: and log e
